title: EUI-64 logged twice on startup in standalone mode
description:
In main.c standalone mode (CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2 && !CONFIG_LICHEN_L2):

1. lichen_lora_l2_init() is called at line 105
2. generate_eui64() logs the EUI-64 at lora_l2.c line 125-127
3. main.c also logs the EUI-64 at lines 127-129

The same EUI-64 appears twice in the log output:
  'EUI-64: aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff:00:11'  (from generate_eui64)
  'EUI-64: aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff:00:11'  (from main.c)

This is cosmetic but confusing for users - they might think initialization happened twice or wonder if the values differ.

Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/src/main.c lines 127-129, firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c lines 125-127
